- [x] Scaffold the Project - Created requirements.txt, main.py, analyzer.py, README.md, data folder.

- [x] Customize the Project - Implemented controller monitoring and analysis code.

- [x] Install Required Extensions - No extensions needed.

- [x] Compile the Project - Dependencies listed in requirements.txt, install with pip install -r requirements.txt

- [x] Create and Run Task - No task needed

- [x] Launch the Project - Console application, run with python main.py

- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete - README.md exists, copilot-instructions.md cleaned

- Work through each checklist item systematically.
- Keep communication concise and focused.
- Follow development best practices.
